seo.title: Building Customer Support with Flowise + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build customer support with Flowise + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Flowise enables rapid development of customer support agents through its drag-and-drop interface, combining RAG pipelines, CRM integrations, and tool-calling for ticket management and order lookups. However, chatflow chains often produce unvalidated outputs, retrieve irrelevant documents, or lose context during agent handoffs, risking inaccurate responses, PII leaks, and policy violations. Vex provides essential guardrails to verify response accuracy, filter sensitive data, ensure tone consistency, and trigger escalations.

architectureOverview.heading: Customer Support Architecture with Flowise
architectureOverview.description: A typical Flowise customer support chatflow starts with a user query routed to a Router Node, which directs to either Knowledge Retrieval (vector store + LLM summarizer) or Tool Calling (CRM API for order lookup/ticket creation). The RAG path embeds the query, retrieves relevant docs from a vector store (Pinecone/Chroma), and generates responses via an LLM chain with conversational memory. Tool paths invoke custom nodes for Salesforce/Zendesk integration, often with sequential agent handoffs for complex resolutions. The final Conditional Router checks for escalation triggers before responding.
architectureOverview.diagram:
┌─────────────────┐    ┌──────────────────┐
│   User Query    │───▶│   Router Node    │
└─────────────────┘    │                  │
                       │  ├─▶[RAG Chain]────┼─▶[Vector Store]
                       │  │   (Embed+LLM)   │  │   Retrieval
                       │  └─▶[Tool Agent]───┼─▶[CRM Tools]
                       │        (Order/    │  │ (SF/Zendesk)
                       │         Ticket)   │  └─▶[Response]
                       └──────────────────┘
                                 │
                        ┌─────────────────┐
                        │ Vex Guardrails  │
                        │ (PII/Tone/Policy)│
                        └─────────────────┘

risks.name: Unvalidated RAG Outputs
risks.description: Vector retrieval returns low-relevance docs, causing hallucinated or inaccurate support responses
risks.mitigation: Vex semantic similarity checks and fact-verification against retrieved context

risks.name: PII Exposure in Responses
risks.description: LLM chains leak customer phone/email/order numbers in generated replies
risks.mitigation: Vex PII entity extraction and redaction before response delivery

risks.name: Context Loss in Agent Handoffs
risks.description: Multi-agent flows drop conversation history between ticket creation and escalation
risks.mitigation: Vex state validation ensuring memory persistence across nodes

risks.name: Tone/Policy Violations
risks.description: Responses use unprofessional language or violate support guidelines
risks.mitigation: Vex sentiment analysis and compliance scoring against style guides

implementation.title: RAG Chain with Vex Callback
implementation.description: Add Vex as a post-processing callback to validate retrieved documents and generated responses

implementation.title: PII Filtering for CRM Tools
implementation.description: Intercept tool outputs from order lookup/ticket creation to redact PII before customer response

implementation.title: Tone Consistency Checker
implementation.description: Ensure all responses match brand voice before delivery using Vex style guide validation

implementation.title: Escalation Trigger Detection
implementation.description: Monitor for frustration signals and policy violations to route to human agents

vexIntegration.title: Global Chatflow Callback Handler
vexIntegration.description: Configure Vex as the primary error handler and validator in Flowise chatflow settings

vexIntegration.title: Custom Vex Node for Flowise Canvas
vexIntegration.description: Drag-and-drop Vex verification node for inline validation between chain components

vexIntegration.title: Session-Level Risk Monitoring
vexIntegration.description: Track cumulative risk across entire customer conversations with Vex session analytics

cta.heading: Secure Your Flowise Customer Support
cta.description: Get started with Vex guardrails in 5 minutes - npm install @vex_dev/sdk and protect your support agents today.
